testcase.name: shouldProcessForecastAndPersistRecord
testcase.system-out:
2026-06-13T16:40:43.359+02:00 INFO 465942 --- [screenplay-assignment] [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.screenplay.integration.ForecastApiIntegrationTest]: ForecastApiIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-06-13T16:40:43.361+02:00 INFO 465942 --- [screenplay-assignment] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.screenplay.ScreenplayAssignmentApplication for test class com.example.screenplay.integration.ForecastApiIntegrationTest 2026-06-13T16:40:43.429+02:00 INFO 465942 --- [screenplay-assignment] [ main] org.eclipse.jetty.util.log : Logging initialized @5060ms to org.eclipse.jetty.util.log.Slf4jLog 2026-06-13T16:40:43.553+02:00 INFO 465942 --- [screenplay-assignment] [ main] org.eclipse.jetty.server.Server : jetty-9.4.49.v20220914; built: 2022-09-14T01:07:36.601Z; git: 4231a3b2e4cb8548a412a789936d640a97b1aa0a; jvm 21.0.11+10-1-24.04.2-Ubuntu 2026-06-13T16:40:43.566+02:00 INFO 465942 --- [screenplay-assignment] [ main] o.e.jetty.server.handler.ContextHandler : Started o.e.j.s.ServletContextHandler@4a5e598e{/__admin,null,AVAILABLE} 2026-06-13T16:40:43.570+02:00 INFO 465942 --- [screenplay-assignment] [ main] o.e.j.s.handler.ContextHandler.ROOT : RequestHandlerClass from context returned com.github.tomakehurst.wiremock.http.StubRequestHandler. testcase.name: shouldReturn502WhenWireMockReturnsError
testcase.system-out:
2026-06-13T16:40:44.295+02:00 INFO 465942 --- [screenplay-assignment] [ main] c.e.s.controller.ForcastController : Received forecast request for date: 2026-05-04 2026-06-13T16:40:44.300+02:00 ERROR 465942 --- [screenplay-assignment] [ main] c.e.screenplay.service.ForecastService : Failed to connect to external forecast API
